description_long: This is a stylized, polygonal barrel with a vibrant blue wooden texture and three prominent dark brown horizontal bands encircling its body. The barrel has a slightly tapered, faceted shape with flat, polygonal faces, giving it a low-poly, cartoon-like appearance. The top and bottom surfaces are flat and also faceted, matching the geometric style of the sides. The brown bands appear to be structural reinforcements, possibly made of metal or painted wood, and are evenly spaced along the height of the barrel. There are a few small, round, dark markings on one of the bands, possibly representing rivets or fasteners. The overall design suggests it is intended for decorative or storage use in an urban or stylized environment.
description: A blue, faceted wooden barrel with three dark brown reinforcement bands and a stylized, low-poly appearance.
description_view_0: The barrel is seen with its blue wooden texture and three brown bands, with no visible markings on the nearest band.
description_view_1: This view shows the same features as view 0, with the brown bands clearly visible and no additional markings.
description_view_2: From this angle, two small dark round markings are visible on the upper brown band, likely representing rivets.
description_view_3: Similar to view 2, the two small dark markings on the upper band are visible, with the blue wood and brown bands prominent.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: dark brown metal or wooden hoops around body
attribute_labeling_or_markings: two small black dots on upper band
